Thus it becomes clear that this method of using Pranapada
for BT rectification is neither logical, nor sage supported.
Demerits of Pranapada method
1) This is neither logical nor sage supported.
2) The method is attributed to BPHS, but BPHS does not
support its use for BT rectification. On the contrary the
results attributed to the presence of Pranapada in the all
the 12 houses indicate that it shouldn't be used for BT
rectification.

86 Secrets o(Birth Time Rectification
Other methods
Actually there remain some more methods to be discussed,
such as use ofMandi, Trisphuta etc used for BT verification.
But as of now, I think this much discussion itself must have
shed enough light on the issue of BT rectification and the
methods to be adopted or researched and clarified.
Conclusion
Every branch of knowledge in India followed the holistic
